author: doll-agent
content: Add shuffle_dyn / permuted_dyn methods on Generator that take &mut Array<T, IxDyn> + axis. shuffle_dyn does Fisher-Yates swapping whole hyperslices (rows/cols/etc.) via outer-x-inner stride loops on the contiguous slice. permuted_dyn runs an independent Fisher-Yates per (outer, inner) coordinate so columns get separate permutations. Existing 1-D shuffle/permutation/permuted stay for backward compat. Tests cover axis=0 row swap, axis=1 column swap, axis-out-of-bounds, permuted independence per column, columns-diverge sanity check, and seed reproducibility.
